title: Gently Smoked Russian Andouille Sausage Skewers
description: A sweet and creamy Russian dish featuring Andouille sausage, perfect for kids and adults alike, with a plant-based friendly option.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to medium heat, about 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the Andouille sausage, pineapple chunks, red onion, bell pepper, and cherry tomatoes onto skewers.
Brush the skewers with a little bit of oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for about 10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the sausage is cooked through.
In a small bowl, mix together the Russian sauce and honey until well combined.
Brush the sauce mixture onto the skewers during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Remove the skewers from the grill and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
